channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture, building rubbish, 12th March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a sofa, some wood & house clearance stuff along the school fence .. in 3 different spots. This area always has rubbish dumped here... Can you please treat it as a hot spot and for something to stop people dumping here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmleigh Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree vandalised, 12th March
item.description:
Someone has deliberately sawn a street tree outside numbers 22-23 West Bank. This is clearly not an accident

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dropped kerb has one stone out of alignment, 12th March
item.description:
Dropped kerb has one stone out of alignment and tarmac damage around it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magee Street, Oval, Greater London

item.title: Flytipped mattress, 12th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped on Faversham Road outside Mind Shop

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faversham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped sofa, 12th March
item.description:
Please can this dumped sofa be removed ASAP. This is a fly tipping hotspot, so more signage to warn against fly-tipping would be great.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Howden Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General waste in street - getting worse, 12th March
item.description:
Very high levels of waste in street towards Elmers End Green ( 2 years - no change) : includes lots of discarded plastic bottles, alcohol cans and bottles, dog waste, plastic bags. Significant higher levels of waste and detritus at end of Clock House Road (nearer Elmers End) than Clock House station. Many examples of tradesmen parking up at lunch and dumping litter in street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 12th March
item.description:
Hi - this street light is not working when it clearly should be. Please can this be investigated and fixed ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waghorn Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous unattached tent lying around the footpath, 12th March
item.description:
A loose tent is lying around the foot path just infront of tortilla

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Cut, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public parking full of rubish, 12th March
item.description:
Public parking from Argent Street in front of Argent Court ,is full of rubish next to the fence of the pub and to the entrance next to fence to the pub.It was never cleaned and every time when the guys with the rubish they comming they turn the head and they left.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Little Thurrock, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two tents, 12th March
item.description:
People are still living in this park. It's been at least two months. Bedding is hung on trees, litter around tent, addicts clearly visible as children go to school.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Palatine Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins constantly placed in the road, 12th March
item.description:
These bins have been left in the road for months, this evening due to the high winds they are blocking the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Gulliver Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
On the bend
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Market Place, Barnehurst, Greater London

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
